action.summary:
Found it! The journey awaiting review is **add-todo** (run 2026-06-11T0422-1b72). Playtest healed it after the baseline action 'click add-button' no longer matched — the agent found a new path using 'click submit-button' instead. The exact command to accept the new recording is:

`playtest accept tests/viewer/fixtures/runs/2026-06-11T0422-1b72/add-todo`

This command is displayed on the run's Diff view under the "first divergence" section.
